name: 2026 Photo Editing Software: Which One is Right for You

step.name: Adobe Lightroom Classic
step.text: Adobe Lightroom Classic has become a staple in the photography world, offering a seamless blend of image management and editing capabilities. Its extensive cataloguing features allow photographers to organise their work efficiently using keywords and ratings, making it an invaluable tool for those who regularly handle large volumes of images. Lightroom's organisation tools are top-notch for photo management. One of Lightroom's key strengths lies in its streamlined, professional workflow. The software provides excellent editing tools and delivers impressive RAW processing performance. For ph...

step.name: Capture One Pro
step.text: Capture One Pro has gained a strong following among professional photographers, particularly those working in studio environments. Known for its excellent RAW processing capabilities, Capture One Pro offers a comprehensive suite of tools to enhance images, making it one of the best image editing software options. The software provides a robust tethering feature, allowing photographers to see their shots on a computer screen in real time as they shoot. This functionality has made Capture One Pro a go-to choice for many studio photographers who require immediate feedback and editing capabilit...

step.name: DxO PhotoLab
step.text: DxO PhotoLab has evolved from its roots as DxO Optics Pro, famous for its lab-derived lens correction profiles and exceptional RAW conversions. The software now incorporates powerful localised adjustment tools, thanks to the integration of the Google Nik Collection's control point technology, making it a strong contender among the best photo editing apps. One of DxO PhotoLab's standout features is its unmatched de-noising technology, which excels at rescuing detail in RAW files. The software also offers an ever-growing list of lens correction profiles, ensuring optimal image quality across...

step.name: ON1 Photo RAW
step.text: ON1 Photo RAW has evolved from a collection of plug-ins into a comprehensive, standalone photo editing solution with powerful AI capabilities. The software offers a blend of traditional editing tools and cutting-edge AI features, making it a strong option among photo editing tools. One of ON1 Photo RAW's standout AI features is its NoNoise AI tool, which has quickly gained recognition for its effectiveness in reducing image noise while preserving detail. This tool puts ON1 Photo RAW on par with dedicated noise reduction software. The software also incorporates AI-powered masking and cutout...

step.name: Affinity Photo
step.text: Affinity Photo is a highly capable photo editing software designed to offer a powerful alternative to Adobe Photoshop and Lightroom at an affordable one-time purchase price. It caters to photographers, designers, and digital artists with a broad suite of professional tools for editing, retouching, and creating complex compositions. The software supports advanced features like layers, masks, RAW processing, HDR merging, and panorama stitching, all while maintaining a non-destructive workflow. It boasts a user-friendly interface that allows for real-time editing and smooth performance, even w...
